result.stdout:
Location:
       (command, DProjects.Core.DIsh, Version=2.0.260.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=null)

    Category:
      Shells

    Description:
      Dish shell

    Synopsis:
      dish [FLAGS] [PATH]

    Flags:
      -l,  --log-format          # Log format. DProjects.Core.Log.LogFormat. Optional. Default 'Rat'. (Auto, Rat, Json, Classic, Csv, W3C, Raw) 
      -L,  --log-level           # Log level. DProjects.Core.Log.LogTypes. Optional. Default 'Error'. (Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Critical, Custom) 
      -c,  --command             # Command to execute. System.String. Optional. Default ''. 
      -h,  --help                # Show help message. System.Boolean. Optional. Default 'False'. 

    Arguments:  
      [PATH]                     # Path. System.String. Optional. Default ''. 

    Examples:
      # Example
      dish

      # Example
      dish script.sh

      # Example
      dish /path/to/script.sh

      # Example
      dish --command 'echo this is a DISH command'

      # Example
      dish --log-level Information

      # Example
      dish --log-format json
